items.name: Bluesteel Midas Hand
items.description: The Bluesteel Midas Hand will turn anything into beautiful Bluesteel!

items.name: Protest Sign: Pro Fake Mustache
items.description: It's a reasonable position, I think.

items.name: Sparkle Time Lump of Coal
items.description: We told you it was unlucky!  This item came out of the unluckiest gift on December 16th, 2013.

items.name: ROBLOX Invisicar
items.description: The Admin-engineered ROBLOX Invisicar - moving ROBLOXians forward since... earlier today.

items.name: Bugle
items.description:
He was a famous trumpet man from out Chicago way / He had a boogie style that no one else could play / He was the top man at his craft, but then his number came up and he was gone with the draft / He's in the army now / He's blowin' reveille /
He's the boogie woogie bugle boy of company B

items.name: Crimson Katana of the Unsetting Sun
items.description: If not for victory and honor, then what?

items.name: Goblet
items.description: Thirsty?

items.name: Overseer Sword & Shield
items.description: Click to swing your sword forward, dealing between 22 and 25 damage. Double click to spawn green flames and lunge forward, dealing double the damage.

items.name: Midnight Sword
items.description: Slash at your foes to do 10 damage. Charge the sword by holding down the left mouse button to change day to night, increase your walk speed, and increase the damage your sword does.

items.name: Barrel O' Monkeys
items.description: More fun than a... oh. Nevermind.

items.name: Gork, Your Caveman Shoulder Friend
items.description: He would be a better conversationalist if his vocabulary were bigger than 12 words.

items.name: Ninja Blink Potion
items.description: You blink - you're in a new location.  Yeah - Ninjas are fast!

items.name: Teapot Launcher
items.description: Have you seen my teapot collection? Here, take a closer look.

items.name: Frostbrand
items.description: A weapon bestowed upon Azurewrath's elite personal bodyguards upon the attainment of rank.

items.name: The Drop
items.description: It's time to drop the bass... on your foes... Drop this awesome bass on your friends or foes when it gets too heavy.

items.name: Foam Finger
items.description: GOoooooooooo ROBLOX!

items.name: Blue Katana of One Thousand Tears
items.description: So, often in the course / Of life's few fleeting years, / A single pleasure costs / The soul a thousand tears.

items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Wind Summoner
items.description: This extremely powerful horn summons a row of tornadoes that will destroy everything (and everyone) in their path!

items.name: Candy Cane Launcher
items.description: Need some holiday cheer? Say hello to my little friend! Rapid fire launch candy canes at anyone who stands in your way.  Does 5 damage per hit.

items.name: Goala Cola
items.description: GGOOOOOOOAAAAAAAALLLLLL!

items.name: Bag O' Noobs
items.description: Aim carefully at your foe and release a group of three noobs. Aim really carefully and you might even make someone catch noob-itis.

items.name: Fusion Gatling Blaster
items.description: This gun has two modes; rapid-fire lasers, and a flamethrower attachment. You can alternate between the two by hitting the 'Q' key.  For the laser shots, you click and hold, and the upper barrel slowly begin to spin with a Gatling-fire like sound effect. It gets faster and louder, shooting projectiles more rapidly until it's at its maximum speed. This is rapid-fire, so there's dozens of lasers hitting your enemies all at once. They each do 8 damage.  The flamethrower, you click and hold as well, which a moderate sized flame blows out from the under-barrel of the gun.

items.name: Bronze Khopesh
items.description: Standard issue for the ancient Egyptian infantry.

items.name: Merely's Green Sparkle Time Hoverboard
items.description: Hover over the skies and speed over your challengers, sparkling green all the way.

items.name: Math Homework
items.description: I was doing my math homework and there was this problem about if a plane travels at 11x the speed of a train and the train is 3x.....blah blah blah...I made a plane!

items.name: Pirate Juice
items.description: Taking a pirate's juice cup is the surest way to get a sword through yer belly!

items.name: Wormhole Tunneler
items.description: Is the speed of light too slow for you? With Wormhole Tunneler there is no galactic speed limit! Create two tunnels to travel between two places instantly. Beware though, as any Robloxian can use these inter-dimensional superhighways.

items.name: Merely's Pink Sparkle Time Hoverboard
items.description: Hover over the skies and speed over your challengers, sparkling pink all the way.

items.name: Dueling Piano
items.description: One simple click will send this piano crashing down from the sky and onto your target.  They'll get crushed and be unable to move while you play them a little tune.  Is it a duel if only one of you has a piano? Only one way to find out.

items.name: Poison Picnic
items.description: This green cake with a skull on it is irresistible.  Does 60 damage to any opponent who picks it up.  Why would they pick it up you say?  Because they have no other choice.
